critique.description: Potential performance issue due to inefficient request handling.
critique.recommendation: Implement load balancing and caching mechanisms to improve performance.

critique.description: Security vulnerability due to lack of authentication and authorization mechanisms.
critique.recommendation: Implement OAuth or JWT to secure the API Gateway.

critique.description: Reliability concern due to potential downtime or data loss.
critique.recommendation: Implement a redundant database setup, such as master-slave replication, to ensure high availability and data integrity.

critique.description: Usability issue due to lack of user experience research and design.
critique.recommendation: Conduct user experience research and design a user-friendly interface that meets the system's usability requirements.

critique.description: Maintainability concern due to potential monolithic architecture.
critique.recommendation: Consider adopting a microservices architecture to improve maintainability and scalability.
